Special_Abilities.name: The Grip
Special_Abilities.description: Can walk vertically up tree trunks while carrying a load

Special_Abilities.name: The Horn
Special_Abilities.description: Males have a massive forked horn used for lifting pallets

Danger.Handling: Requires special handling (Clickers or pheromone-wands); becomes immobile if scared

Components.name: Shell
Components.description: Harvested to make shields, roofing tiles, and instrument bodies
